Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Timothy Barry. Author, maintainer.

  • Louis Deutsch. Author.

  • Eugene Katsevich. Author.

  • Wharton Analytics. Funder.

  • National Science Foundation. Funder.
    Grants DMS-2113072 and DMS-2310654

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Barry, T., Wang, X., Morris, J. A., Roeder, K., & Katsevich, E. (2021). SCEPTRE improves calibration and sensitivity in single-cell CRISPR screen analysis. Genome Biology, 22(1), 1-19.

@Article{,
  author = {Timothy Barry and Xuran Wang and John A. Morris and Kathryn Roeder and Eugene Katsevich},
  title = {SCEPTRE improves calibration and sensitivity in single-cell CRISPR screen analysis},
  journal = {Genome Biology},
  year = {2021},
  volume = {22},
  number = {1},
  pages = {1--19},
  publisher = {Springer Nature},
  doi = {10.1186/s13059-021-02545-2},
  url = {https://link.springer.com/article/10.1186/s13059-021-02545-2},
}

Barry, T., Roeder, K., & Katsevich, E. (2024). Exponential family measurement error models for single-cell CRISPR screens. Biostatistics, kxae010.

@Article{,
  author = {Timothy Barry and Kathryn Roeder and Eugene Katsevich},
  title = {Exponential family measurement error models for single-cell CRISPR screens},
  journal = {Biostatistics},
  year = {2024},
  pages = {kxae010},
  publisher = {Oxford University Press},
  doi = {10.1093/biostatistics/kxae010},
  url = {https://doi.org/10.1093/biostatistics/kxae010},
}

Barry, T., Mason, K., Roeder, K., & Katsevich, E. (2024). Robust differential expression testing for single-cell CRISPR screens at low multiplicity of infection. Genome Biology, 25(124), 1-30.

@Article{,
  author = {Timothy Barry and Kaishu Mason and Kathryn Roeder and Eugene Katsevich},
  title = {Robust differential expression testing for single-cell CRISPR screens at low multiplicity of infection},
  journal = {Genome Biology},
  year = {2024},
  volume = {25},
  number = {124},
  pages = {1--30},
  publisher = {Springer Nature},
  doi = {10.1186/s13059-024-03254-2},
  url = {https://link.springer.com/article/10.1186/s13059-024-03254-2},
}
